route_area_label_policy: Use source-map area IDs and cue-family labels in developer evidence; player-facing captures should avoid exact route locators.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: No debug labels; screenshot should read as open surface access plus first seabed shell.
captures.reason: Confirms the entire water surface remains open and the first descent starts from the authored shell.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: No debug labels; cave mouth should read through terrain silhouette and rim/lip contrast.
captures.reason: Covers the first left-side pocket where wall-vs-water readability can regress.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: No debug labels; shelf pocket should show resource/payoff affordances without exact locator copy.
captures.reason: Checks the early right-side pocket that players can reach before committing to deeper routes.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: No debug labels; central descent should imply depth and return direction through readable terrain edges.
captures.reason: Validates the main vertical route that makes repeated oxygen-return dives work.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: No debug labels; chamber identity should come from shape, pocket contents, and return-current cue.
captures.reason: Covers the broader west chamber where resources must not appear embedded in walls.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: No debug labels; right chamber should separate payoff/promise cues from solid wall mass.
captures.reason: Checks the larger right-side loop target against source-map placement drift.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: No debug labels; deep route should read as below-surface risk and future-route promise without becoming a map overlay.
captures.reason: Covers the deepest current shell state and the highest risk of wall/collision confusion.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: No debug labels; future-exit corridor should read as framed cave water, not a blank rectangular void.
captures.reason: Covers the right/deep corridor where sparse runtime geometry previously failed to match the uploaded source-map intent.

captures.expected_route_area_label_policy: Developer-only source/cue labels are expected and should match source-map IDs.
captures.reason: Confirms the debug overlay can explain source-map lanes, collisions, cue ownership, and capture state.
